EXALTED-SCENES.Permissions.DefaultHint: Applied to players not listed below
When enabled, clicking Play broadcasts immediately to all players (original behavior). When disabled, scenes open in Preview Mode first, allowing you to review before going live.
EXALTED-SCENES.Settings.BackgroundFitMod: Controls how scene backgrounds scale to the screen. "Fill" covers the screen (may crop). "Fit" shows the full image (adds letterbox bars). "Smart" auto-selects based on aspect ratio. Widescreen users should try "Fit" or "Smart".
Fill (Cover) - Fills screen, may crop edges
Fit (Contain) - Full image with letterbox bars
